title: Panthers' Nic Scourton suffers torn ACL on first day of NFL training camp
dek: Panthers second-year pass rusher Nic Scourton tore his ACL on the opening day of NFL training camp and was carted off the field. The season-ending injury forces the team into immediate contingency planning at a critical defensive position.
author: The GoCheckMySports Desk
key_fact: Scourton suffered a torn ACL on the first day of Panthers training camp, per CBS Sports.
bottom_line: The Panthers must now identify a replacement option within their existing roster or look to the trade market to shore up their pass rush depth. Watch for the team's roster moves over the next week to gauge how they plan to absorb Scourton's absence.
body: Panthers second-year pass rusher Nic Scourton tore his ACL on the first day of NFL training camp, according to CBS Sports. Scourton was carted off the field during the injury.

The loss removes a young defender from the team's pass rush rotation before the 2026 season opens, forcing the Panthers into immediate contingency planning at a position central to their defensive scheme.
Scourton's availability and expected timeline for return remain unaddressed in the official reporting.
